command.linux:
sh -c 'set_kv(){ key="$1"; value="$2"; [ -z "$value" ] && return 0; tmp=".env.tmp.$$"; touch .env; found=0; while IFS= read -r line; do case "$line" in "$key="*) printf "%s=%s
" "$key" "$value"; found=1 ;; *) printf "%s
" "$line" ;; esac; done < .env > "$tmp"; [ "$found" -eq 0 ] && printf "%s=%s
" "$key" "$value" >> "$tmp"; mv "$tmp" .env; }; set_kv AGENT_UID "{AGENT_UID}"; set_kv AGENT_DESCR "{AGENT_DESCR}"; set_kv LOG_FILE_PATH "{LOG_FILE_PATH}"; set_kv THREAD_COUNT "{THREAD_COUNT}"'
command.windows: powershell -NoProfile -Command "function Set-Kv($key,$value){ if([string]::IsNullOrEmpty($value)){ return }; $envFile='.env'; if(Test-Path $envFile){ $content=Get-Content $envFile } else { $content=@() }; $line=\"$key=$value\"; $updated=$false; $out=@(); foreach($item in $content){ if($item -match \"^$([regex]::Escape($key))=\"){ $out += $line; $updated=$true } else { $out += $item } }; if(-not $updated){ $out += $line }; Set-Content -Path $envFile -Value $out }; Set-Kv 'AGENT_UID' '{AGENT_UID}'; Set-Kv 'AGENT_DESCR' '{AGENT_DESCR}'; Set-Kv 'LOG_FILE_PATH' '{LOG_FILE_PATH}'; Set-Kv 'THREAD_COUNT' '{THREAD_COUNT}'"
command.macos:
sh -c 'set_kv(){ key="$1"; value="$2"; [ -z "$value" ] && return 0; tmp=".env.tmp.$$"; touch .env; found=0; while IFS= read -r line; do case "$line" in "$key="*) printf "%s=%s
" "$key" "$value"; found=1 ;; *) printf "%s
" "$line" ;; esac; done < .env > "$tmp"; [ "$found" -eq 0 ] && printf "%s=%s
" "$key" "$value" >> "$tmp"; mv "$tmp" .env; }; set_kv AGENT_UID "{AGENT_UID}"; set_kv AGENT_DESCR "{AGENT_DESCR}"; set_kv LOG_FILE_PATH "{LOG_FILE_PATH}"; set_kv THREAD_COUNT "{THREAD_COUNT}"'

THREAD_COUNT.description: Total thread count including logger thread
